items.originalStem:
The boy practised throwing the ball many times. He could not hit the target.

**No matter**  ________________________________
________________________________
items.originalAnswer: No matter how many times the boy practised throwing the ball, he could not hit the target.

simple.stem:
The old man walked slowly. He reached the top of the hill.

**Although** ________________________________
________________________________
simple.answer: Although the old man walked slowly, he reached the top of the hill.

similar.stem:
My sister studied very hard for the test. She still failed it.

**Despite** ________________________________
________________________________
similar.answer: Despite studying very hard for the test, my sister still failed it.

items.originalStem:
The children begged their parents for a new pet. Their parents firmly refused.

**No matter** ________________________________
________________________________
items.originalAnswer: No matter how much the children begged their parents for a new pet, their parents firmly refused.

simple.stem:
The old man was very tired. He continued walking to the market.

________________________________ **Although** ________________________________
simple.answer: The old man continued walking to the market although he was very tired.

similar.stem:
The team trained rigorously every day. They lost the championship match.

**Despite** ________________________________
________________________________
similar.answer: Despite training rigorously every day, the team lost the championship match.
